The daily reality

Small tech problems have a big hidden cost.

A projector that won't connect. A login that won't work. A printer that's down. Each one pulls a teacher out of the lesson — and lands as one more ticket on an IT team that's already stretched thin.

For teachers

Lessons interrupted, momentum lost

Every minute spent troubleshooting a device is a minute taken from students. Teachers aren't IT staff — and they shouldn't have to be.

For IT teams

Buried in repetitive tickets

The same low-complexity issues, over and over, crowd out the project work that actually moves the institution forward.

How it works

Three simple steps. No tickets, no jargon.

A teacher reports an issue, EduDesk AI resolves it on the spot — and when it can't, a real person picks it up.

01

Report it

A teacher flags the problem in plain language — by app, chat or a quick message. Seconds, not a support form.

02

AI resolves it instantly

EduDesk AI knows your exact systems and fixes common issues on the spot — logins, projectors, printers, LMS access.

03

A human steps in when needed

Anything the AI can't solve goes straight to our remote support team. Either way, the teacher gets back to teaching.

Why EduDesk AI

A calmer, more predictable way to run support.

Predictable annual cost

One subscription instead of expensive IT staffing and overtime. You know exactly what support costs for the year.

Frees your IT team

Repetitive, low-complexity tickets are handled automatically — so your existing staff focus on the work that matters.

Learns your institution

It maps your specific systems, software and quirks — and gets sharper at resolving your issues over time.

Serious about student data

Encryption, strict access controls and data residency built to education's safeguarding and privacy standards.

The value lands where it counts — time, cost and calm.

Built for education

One service, shaped to how schools and universities really work.

classroom photo — K–12

K–12 schools & trusts

Keep interactive boards, registers, printers and login systems running across every classroom — without a tech expert in the building.

lecture hall photo — higher ed

Colleges & universities

Support faculty across lecture halls, labs and departments — at the scale and complexity higher education demands.

Student data, protected by design

EduDesk AI is built around education's duty of care. Data is encrypted, access is tightly controlled, and information stays within UK & EU residency — with safeguarding considerations baked into how the service operates.

Pricing

Simple annual subscription. No surprises.

One predictable cost for the whole institution. Final pricing is tailored to your size and systems.

FAQ

Questions schools ask us first.

Where is our student data stored and processed?

All data stays within UK & EU data residency, is encrypted in transit and at rest, and access is tightly controlled. EduDesk AI is built around education's safeguarding and privacy standards, and a compliance summary is available for your DPO on request.

How long does setup take?

Most single schools are mapped and live within two to three weeks. We handle the systems mapping — connecting your projectors, printers, LMS and SSO — so there's minimal work required from your existing IT staff.

What happens when the AI can't fix something?

It escalates instantly to a real person on our remote support team, with full context attached — no re-explaining the problem. Anything needing hands-on-site is flagged to your own IT team the same way.

Is there a minimum contract length?

Subscriptions run on an annual term to match school budgeting cycles. Trust and district plans can add or remove sites at renewal as your estate changes.

Does this replace our IT team?

No — it takes the repetitive, low-complexity tickets off their plate. Your team stays in control of anything hands-on-site or strategic, with more time to spend on it.

Which systems does EduDesk AI connect to?

Google Classroom, Canvas and Moodle, Epson and most classroom projector networks, PaperCut print servers, staff SSO/identity providers, and Microsoft Intune for device management — with more added on request.

See EduDesk AI handle your school's real issues.

Book a 20-minute walkthrough. We'll map it to your systems and show what it could save you this year.

Start with one school or department Most institutions pilot EduDesk AI in a single school or department before rolling out trust-wide — low risk, real results before you commit further.
